metadata.description: Knowledge management and workflow automation plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: session-learner
plugins.description: Session memory persistence, git-aware context, take-away reflections, and /digest for files/URLs → Zettelkasten cards

plugins.name: autoresearch
plugins.description: Iterative improvement loop with eval-driven keep/discard and live HTML dashboard, inspired by karpathy/autoresearch

plugins.name: remotion-maker
plugins.description: Generate Remotion videos with consistent style, media sourcing, and multi-tier verification

plugins.name: hh
plugins.description: LifeOS-as-SSOT handover document management via folder symlinks. Subsumes /op:wrap-up-today.

plugins.name: code-reviewer
plugins.description: Principle-aware PR review. Layers a repo-specific review-mindset agent on top of pr-review-toolkit's 4+6 perspectives, sourcing distilled principles from LifeOS.

plugins.name: uiux-optimizer
plugins.description: UI/UX design advisor — analyzes code against real-world patterns from refero.design, surfaces 2-3 named-brand design directions from the awesome-design-md catalogue (getdesign.md), and suggests improvements for visual design, layout, and component patterns
